items.caption: A green first aid sign with a white cross symbol at the top. the sign has white text that reads "first aid nearest first aid box is situated at person in charge." the text is clear and legible, and the sign is designed to be easily visible and understood. the background of the image is plain white, which contrasts with the green color of the sign and makes the text stand out. the sign is likely placed in a location where first aid is readily available, such as a workplace or public facility.
A wooden shelf displays a neatly arranged first aid kit with a box of band-aids, tube of ointment, and bag of cotton balls, set against a wooden floor background.
